properties.remark: FULL SIZE ASPEN TREE BLOWN DOWN INTO ROADWAY BY THUNDERSTORM WINDS ESTIMATED AT 60 MPH.
56 MPH SUSTAINED GUST 69 MPH AT LIVINGSTON AIRPORT
ESTIMATED WIND GUSTS OF 60 TO 70 MPH. LARGE COTTON WOOD TREE BLOWN DOWN.
ESTIMATED WIND GUSTING TO 60 PLUS. DAMAGE - 2 TREES BLOWN OVER AND TIN ROOFING MATERIAL BLOWN OFF.
ESTIMATED WINDS GUSTING 60-70 MPH. DAMAGE - 5 INCH TREE LIMBS BROKEN OFF TREE. 0.50 INCH HAIL.
ESTIMATED WIND GUSTS BETWEEN 60-70 MPH. WHEELBARROW BLOWN OVER AND SHINGLES BLOWN OFF ROOF.
HAIL RANGED IN SIZE FROM PEA TO QUARTER SIZE.
QUARTER SIZE HAIL ACCOMPANIED BY THUNDERSTORM WIND GUSTS ESTIMATED AT 50 MPH.

ONE BIG WIND GUST ESTIMATED BETWEEN 60-70 MPH BROKE A 12 INCH DIAMETER TREE WITH 4 INCH BRANCHES. TORE A HOLE IN HOUSE AND LANDED ON TWO VEHICLES...ONE WAS DAMAGED. LOT OF DEBRIS BLOWN AROUND JUST BEFORE TREE BROKE.
EVENT LASTED 35 MINUTES. MINOR LEAF DAMAGE OBSERVED.
